title: Craft Sponge
description: Adds a crafting recipe for sponge
body:
![craft sponge datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/craft_sponge.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![craft sponge minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/craft-sponge/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## Recipe ![Minecraft Sponge Crafting Recipe Sponge Crafting minecraft recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29f75684c12cd7d4f13bb8d1c9ee52027d3f02cc.png) 4 Slime Blocks, 4 Yellow Concrete Powder, 1 Water Bucket = 1 Wet Sponge
